nodes.name: 費迪南德·海涅
nodes.summary: 費迪南德·海涅是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联7种鸟类，包括Cinnamon-rumped trogon、Rough-legged tyrannulet、红眼蒙霸鹟等7种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Ocellated tapaculo
nodes.summary: Ocellated tapaculo（Ocellated tapaculo，学名 Acropternis orthonyx），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联8个分布地点节点。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is sometimes divided into two subspecies: Acropternis orthonyx infuscatus is found in the mountains of Ecuador and northern Peru

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is sometimes divided into two subspecies: Acropternis orthonyx infuscatus is found in the mountains of Ecuador and northern Peru

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is not usually found on the Amazonian slope of the East Colombian and Venezuelan mountains it inhabits; on the Cordillera Oriental it is only known so far in a few places between 8,200 and 10,000 ft (2,500-3,000 m) ASL. The northern and southern populations are barely distinguishable and many authors accept no subspecies at all
